steps.title: Use the exaggeration clue
steps.content: The passage contrasts realist painting with romantic painting. It says Moreau's paintings altered subjects to appear more beautiful or heroic than they really were, so the blank must mean heightening positive traits.

steps.title: Select the amplifying verb
steps.content: Choice A means correct, Choice B means neutralize, and Choice D means understand or arrest. Those do not describe making positive traits seem greater. Magnify means enlarge or intensify, matching the idea of making subjects look more beautiful or heroic. The answer is C.
